title: Oairse Set of 5 Plant Pots Outdoor Galvanised Planter Garden Planters Metal Plant Pots Vintage Zinc Round Bucket Flower Pot Rustic Container for Plant or Decorative Home Modern Farmhouse Indoor
features: Vintage zinc planters - Perfect for any modern, party, wedding, farmhouse, and rustic home furnishings thanks to its distressed style and design. Give your space more room to display and support your plants, flowers, and other decorations.
High Quality - Made of high quality metal, arranged with anti-rust treatment process which makes them more practical, durable.
Dimension - Contain 5 different size galvanized pots: D-9.5cm x H-8.5cm, D-10cm x H-9cm, D-13cm x H-11cm, D-15cm x H-13cm, D-18cm x H-15cm. You can grow diverse size of plants, succulents or flowers.

Multiple Application - Ideal not only for plants and flowers, but can also be as a storage basket, fill it with ornaments, or put your favorite stuffs in it as a display box in any room in your house.
Friendly Customer Support - Each flower pot are wraped with thick foam to avoid damage to the flowerpot during transportation. If you have any problem, please feel free contact us.
